dashboard.name: Dashboard Overview
dashboard.description: Learn how to navigate your dashboard and track job applications.

steps.title: Job Stats
steps.content: View your total discovered jobs, scored jobs, and jobs that are a high fit based on your search criteria.

steps.title: Recent Jobs
steps.content: View jobs that match your profile and see how well they score as a fit.

steps.title: Job results
steps.content: Click the sync jobs button to search top job boards and web sites for your dream job.

pipeline.name: Pipeline Board
pipeline.description: Learn how to manage your active job applications.

steps.title: Pipeline Board
steps.content: Track your applications visually as they move from Applied to Offer.

steps.title: Update Status
steps.content: Quickly change a job's status by using the dropdown on any job card.

settings.name: Settings & Preferences
settings.description: Learn how to configure your job preferences.

steps.title: Settings
steps.content: Navigate to the settings menu to configure your preferences.

steps.title: Job Discovery
steps.content: Set your role, location, and job sites you'd like to search.

steps.title: Tell us what you're looking for
steps.content: Let us know what's important in your next role like goals, salary, and work environment.

steps.title: Resume
steps.content: Upload your latest resume so the agent can use it to apply for jobs.

analytics.name: Analytics Dashboard
analytics.description: Learn how to track your application metrics.

steps.title: High-Level Metrics
steps.content: View your total discovered, scored, applied, and interviewing stats.

steps.title: Conversion Funnel
steps.content: See how well you're converting from scored to applied, and applied to interviews.

steps.title: Pipeline Status
steps.content: Breakdown of jobs currently in every stage of your pipeline.

assets.name: Base Assets
assets.description: Learn how to manage your master resume for AI generation.

steps.title: Base Resume Editor
steps.content: This is your master resume text. The AI uses this to tailor a unique version for every job application.

steps.title: Upload or Paste
steps.content: Upload your existing PDF/Word resume, or paste its text directly to populate the editor.

job_details.name: Job Details Analysis
job_details.description: Learn how the AI analyzes and helps you apply to jobs.

steps.title: AI Opportunity Score
steps.content: A detailed breakdown of how well this job matches your preferences and profile.

steps.title: Review Job Description
steps.content: The original job description scraped from the web.

steps.title: Application Assets
steps.content: Generate a tailored cover letter, networking message, and resume extract specifically for this role.
